candidate_grammar.boundary: All discrete structures generated from finite canonical One/Fold forms, exact positive traces, held selections, pair-cell relations and successor construction.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of collection coverage, canonical identity, membership, relation support, map law, sequence order, induction closure and extra-constructor status.

excluded_inputs: no semantic numerical zero for the empty selection
no presentation alias may replace canonical form identity
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 256-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: Every admitted discrete object is a complete canonical generated finite collection or held selection; membership is retained occurrence, relations are held selections of complete pair-cell support, maps are total single-valued relations, sequences retain generated order, and general laws close by structural One/base-successor induction.
title: Generated discrete objects, relations and induction
